title: Device Home Screen - Device Onboarding Screens
scenario: Onboarding flow fails to display when connecting a supported Poly Voyager Free device for the first time
steps: 1. Ensure no Poly Bluetooth audio device is currently paired or connected to the phone.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
3. Put the supported device (e.g., Poly Voyager Free 60+) into pairing mode (press and hold the Bluetooth button until LED flashes).
4. Pair the device via phone Bluetooth settings or the app prompt.
5. Observe the onboarding flow: a welcome popup should appear.
6. Swipe or navigate through all onboarding screens.
7. When prompted, perform the fit test functionality (if applicable).
8. Reach the final 'Having Trouble?' screen and verify it displays 'Done' and 'User Guide' buttons.
10. Disconnect and forget the device from Bluetooth settings.
11. Repeat steps 3-9 with a second supported device (e.g., Poly Voyager Free 60).
12. Disconnect and forget the second device.
13. Repeat steps 3-9 with a third supported device (e.g., Poly Voyager Free 20).
14. For each device, during the onboarding flow, navigate away to other app screens (e.g., Home, Device Settings, Audio Settings) and then return to verify onboarding resumes correctly.
15. Confirm that onboarding is displayed fresh for each newly paired device, regardless of prior onboarding completion for other devices.
expected: Onboarding screens (welcome popup, swipeable screens, fit test, final 'Having Trouble?' screen with 'Done' and 'User Guide' buttons) are displayed correctly for each newly paired supported device. Onboarding resumes properly if the user navigates to other app screens during the flow.
